rationale: Five replications: (1) fred_indpro (γ=0.94, AR(1)-non-sep); (2) btcusdt_1h (γ≈0, white-noise); (3) nsr2db nsr001 n=1 SUPERSEDED; (4) nsr2db n=5 multifractal (γ varies, Δh=0.19, beat-null 4/5); (5) chf2db pathology contrast — FIRST POSITIVE FINDING: 2D (h(q=2), Δh) fingerprint discriminates NSR vs CHF with Cohen's d=-2.56 on h(q=2) and +1.85 on Δh. Cardiac substrate has defensible WITHIN-substrate marker (per-cohort calibration); cross-substrate convergence still NOT supported. Bumped 4→5 in same PR.
